title: Rdc12 breaks mRemoteNG on Win10
author: tecxx
body_snippet:
FYI
RdpVersion.cs was modified on 12.11.2024, line 11 -> Rdc12 was added
this breaks mRemoteNG on windows 10.

iterations.description: No reproduction steps, logs, or screenshots provided, and issue needs retest on latest build to confirm if still reproducible.

comments.author: robertpopa22
comments.snippet:
**Fix available for testing**

**Commit:** `6c110776` (fork `robertpopa22/mRemoteNG`, branch `main`)
**What changed:** Rdc12 breaks mRemoteNG on Win10

A beta build (v1.81.0-beta.4) including this fix is available from the fork's Releases page.
